13.name: CL
13.description: Programmable current-limit pin. Connect to device GND if external current limit is not used.

14.name: CS
14.description: Current-sense output. Leave floating if not used. (also: ST — Open-drain diagnostic status output. Leave floating if not used.)

12.name: DIAG_EN
12.description: Enable and disable pin for diagnostic functions. Connect to device GND if not used.

EP.name: Thermal pad
EP.description: Thermal pad. Connect to device GND or leave floating.

Reverse_current_on_GND__t___12.parameter: Reverse current on GND, t < 120 s

Inductive_load_switch_off_ener.parameter: Inductive load switch-off energy dissipation, single pulse

VS,op.conditions: RDS(on) value increases maximum 20%, compared to 5 V, see RDS(on) parameter

VS,UVR.conditions: VS rises up, VS > VS,UVR, device turn on

VS,UVF.conditions: VS falls down, VS < VS,UVF, device shuts off

Inom.conditions: VIN = 5 V, VDIAG_EN = 0 V, no load

Ioff.conditions: VS = 13.5 V, VIN = VDIAG_EN = VCS = VCL = VOUTPUT = 0 V, TJ = 25°C

Ioff_VS___13_5_V__VIN___VDIAG_EN.conditions: VS = 13.5 V, VIN = VDIAG_EN = VCS = VCL = VOUTPUT = 0 V, TJ = 125°C

toff,deg.conditions: IN from high to low, if deglitch time > toff,deg, enters into standby mode

Ilim,tsd.conditions: Internal current limit, thermal cycling condition

Ilim,tsd_External_current_limit__therma.conditions: External current limit, thermal cycling condition; Percentage of current limit set value

Irev1.parameter: Continuous reverse current when reverse polarity
Irev1.conditions: t < 60 s, VS = 13.5 V, GND pin 1-kΩ resistor in parallel with diode. TJ = 25°C.

Irev2.parameter: Continuous reverse current when VOUT > VS + Vdiode

Vol,off.conditions: VIN = 0 V, When VS - VOUT < Vol,off, duration longer than tol,off.

Iol,off.parameter: Off-state output sink current with open load
Iol,off.conditions: VIN = 0 V, VS = VOUT = 13.5 V, TJ = 125°C

tol,off.parameter: Open-load detection-threshold deglitch time in off-state
tol,off.conditions: VIN = 0 V, When VS - VOUT < Vol,off, duration longer than tol,off.

Iol,on.conditions: VIN = 5 V, when IOUT < Iol,on, duration longer than tol,on.

tol,on.parameter: Open-load detection-threshold deglitch time in on-state
tol,on.conditions: VIN = 5 V, when IOUT < Iol,on, duration longer than tol,on.

Thys.parameter: Hysteresis for resetting the thermal shutdown and swing

VCS,H_VS____5_V__min_value_is_Min_VS.conditions: VS >= 5 V, min value is Min(VS - 0.8, 4.3)

ICS,leak.parameter: Current sense leakage current in disabled mode
ICS,leak.conditions: VIN = 5 V, Rload = 10 Ω, VDIAG_EN = 0 V, TJ = 125°C

ICS,leak_VIN___0_V__VDIAG_EN___0_V__TJ.parameter: Current sense leakage current in disabled mode
